project.title: Accounting & Bookkeeping Platform
project.description: Multi-tenant accounting platform: a business manages its ledger, invoices, bills, payments, payroll and supporting documents through one API.

flow.title: Core Business Flows
flow.description: Four major flows run side-by-side: invoicing money in, bill-pay sending money out, bank reconciliation aligning the ledger with reality, and payroll paying employees. All share a common identity + document substrate.

domains.name: Identity & Access
domains.description: Authenticates tenants and enforces who can act on a business profile.

domains.name: Finance & Payments
domains.description: Money-in (invoices) and money-out (bills, payroll) flowing through a payment processor.

domains.name: Accounting Core
domains.description: Chart of accounts, ledger entries, and the bank reconciliation engine.

domains.name: Documents
domains.description: Attachments, statements and exports tied to the rest of the system.

steps.title: API Gateway
steps.description: All requests enter here. Validates the access token and resolves the active business profile.

steps.title: Business Profile Resolver
steps.description: Picks the active business profile for the caller and loads which feature modules are enabled.

steps.title: Invoice Service
steps.description: Creates and updates invoices for a customer. Lines roll up to a total; status moves draft → sent → paid.

steps.title: Bill-Pay Service
steps.description: Receives a vendor bill, schedules a payment and applies it against the right account.

steps.title: Payment Processor
steps.description: Third-party gateway that captures cards or initiates bank transfers and webhooks the result back.

steps.title: Payment Webhook Handler
steps.description: Receives async events from the payment processor and updates the invoice/bill status accordingly.

steps.title: Bank Reconciliation Service
steps.description: Accepts an uploaded bank statement and opens a reconciliation session.

steps.title: Match Engine
steps.description: Parses statement lines and matches each one to ledger entries. Anything unmatched is queued as an exception.

steps.title: Reconciliation Report
steps.description: Surfaces matches, adjustments and outstanding items back to the user.

steps.title: Payroll Service
steps.description: Runs payroll for the active period, computing taxes and per-employee compensation.

steps.title: Ledger Writer
steps.description: Posts double-entry rows to the appropriate accounts in the chart of accounts.

steps.title: Document Store
steps.description: Stores invoices, bills and uploaded attachments. Files are linked to their owning business profile.
